title: Trailing comments not stripped from views, invalid dumps
key_bug_features: Trailing comments not stripped from database views
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), email TEXT UNIQUE);
CREATE VIEW user_info AS SELECT id, name, age FROM users;
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 'alice@example.com');
SELECT * FROM user_info WHERE age IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM user_info WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE age < 25);
